PATRICK WANG
Projects

Interactive Research Constellation

Patrick Wang

Biomedical Engineering student @ University of Waterloo

I build wearable intelligence from biosignals - EMGElectromyographyMeasures electrical activity produced by skeletal muscles, often used for intent detection in wearables., EEGElectroencephalographyRecords electrical activity from the scalp to analyze brain states, attention, and neural dynamics., and IMUInertial Measurement UnitA sensor package combining accelerometers and gyroscopes to track body or device motion. - using machine learning.
